tagline: The largest emergency and night medical services center in Umm al-Fahm and the region

common.address: City Gate Building, Floor 1, A-Kuds Street, Umm al-Fahm

hero.title: The largest emergency center in Umm al-Fahm
hero.subtitle: Emergency services and evening & night clinics, with a specialized team serving members of all health funds.

emergencyCallout.title: Emergency?
emergencyCallout.description: Our medical team is ready to help you anytime. Call now or book through WhatsApp.

services.sectionSubtitle: Integrated services to the highest professional and human standards

emergency.title: Emergency Room
emergency.short: Advanced emergency services with a specialized medical team.
emergency.long: A modern emergency room equipped with the latest medical technology, receiving urgent cases at all hours. We provide rapid examinations, immediate treatments, and follow-up for cases requiring further care.

pediatrics.title: Pediatrics
pediatrics.short: Comprehensive pediatric clinic led by Dr. Mohammad Kabaha — Pediatrics specialist.
pediatrics.long: Specialized pediatric clinic directed by Dr. Mohammad Kabaha — Director of Pediatric Medicine at Meuhedet North. We offer comprehensive care from infancy through adolescence, vaccinations, treatment of common conditions, and growth/development monitoring.

womensHealth.title: English Clinic — Pregnancy & Women's Health
womensHealth.short: Comprehensive women's services — free for all women, every Thursday.
womensHealth.long: In partnership with the English Hospital in Nazareth, we provide pregnancy monitoring, high-risk pregnancy care, gestational diabetes management, childbirth preparation courses, lactation consulting, and nutrition/exercise guidance — free of charge for all women, regardless of insurance.

general.title: General Examinations & Treatments
general.short: Comprehensive medical examinations and treatments for various conditions.
general.long: Clinical examinations, laboratory tests, general medical consultations, and follow-up for chronic conditions. We work with all health funds efficiently and quickly.

doctors.sectionSubtitle: Highly experienced doctors and specialists at your service

team.sectionSubtitle: The team that welcomes and serves you

news.sectionSubtitle: Updates and announcements from Sarah Medical Center

healthFunds.sectionTitle: We serve all health fund members
healthFunds.sectionSubtitle: In partnership with all Israeli health funds

forms.name: Full Name
forms.subject: Subject
forms.privacyConsent: I agree to the processing of my data in accordance with the privacy policy
forms.successMessage: Our team will contact you soon to confirm the details.
forms.errorMessage: An error occurred. Please try again or contact us directly.

contact.sectionSubtitle: We're here to answer your questions
contact.formDescription: For general questions and inquiries. For emergencies, please call directly.

booking.pageSubtitle: Easily book your appointment via the form — we'll contact you to confirm.
instructions: Booking does not guarantee the appointment until confirmed by our staff.
Bring your ID and health fund card.

about.pageSubtitle: Comprehensive medical care at international standards in the heart of Umm al-Fahm
about.missionText: We strive to provide excellent medical services to the highest professional and human standards — including emergency and specialized care for all members of the Arab community in Umm al-Fahm and the region.
about.visionText: To be the leading medical center trusted by residents in the area, reaching every home through our diverse services and specialized team.

values.professionalismText: We adhere to the highest medical and ethical standards.
values.compassionText: We treat every patient with respect and human attention.
values.accessibilityText: Services for all, regardless of health fund.

insurance.pageSubtitle: We serve members of all Israeli health funds
insurance.description: Sarah Medical Center accepts insurance from all kupot cholim. Examinations and treatments are covered according to each fund's policy.

accessibility.intro: Sarah Medical Center is committed to providing an accessible website to all users, including people with disabilities, in accordance with the Equal Rights for Persons with Disabilities (Service Accessibility Adjustments) Regulations, 2013.

privacy.intro: We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data in accordance with the Israeli Privacy Protection Law.

errors.notFoundDescription: Sorry, the page you're looking for isn't available.
